search_summary.notes: Rajapalayam is a smaller town (Virudhunagar district, Tamil Nadu). The optical wholesale market here is limited. Most businesses are retail optical showrooms. Star Opticals (IndiaMART supplier) and Aditya Opticals are the closest to wholesale operations found. Major wholesale lens distributors (Essilor, Zeiss) serve this area through regional distributors rather than having dedicated offices in Rajapalayam itself. For bulk lens procurement, nearby larger cities like Madurai, Sivakasi, or Chennai would have more wholesale options. JustDial pages returned empty content due to anti-scraping measures.
